name: Shannon Airport
tagline: Public satellite layers, time-stamped imagery, and live flight context for EINN
description: Browse Shannon Airport (Ireland) with multiple public satellite basemaps (Esri, USGS, NASA GIBS MODIS/VIIRS with selectable dates, Sentinel-2 cloudless mosaic). Compare change over time via dated NASA layers. Cross-reference with OpenSky ADS-B state data near the field, with heuristic highlighting of US-linked traffic for research (not authoritative). Includes links to Copernicus, EO Browser, and reference material.

env_vars.description: Public base URL for metadata (e.g. https://shannonairport.6cubed.app)
